listitem.para: Scalar or two-element [rows cols] neighborhood. Values must be positive odd integers. The default is [3 3].
Double image containing local maximum minus local minimum.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns the local maximum minus the local minimum in each rectangular neighborhood. High values indicate local contrast, texture, or edges. The implementation uses OpenCV morphology through imdilate and imerode, so it is suitable for normal image-sized inputs.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: Updated to use OpenCV morphology for local maximum and minimum computation.
